name: The Sync
effect: Restore access to a file that was previously accessible. This card is considered seamless.

clauses.name: GIVETH CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a file is uploaded: The file is considered permanently available.

clauses.name: TAKETH AWAY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: At any subsequent time: The file is unavailable, moved, or renamed without explanation.

clauses.name: RECONCILIATION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the user reports the missing file: The file is found in a location the user did not create.

witness_quote: It was there yesterday, I swear.
